whyUs.title: Built for instant creation
whyUs.reason1Desc: Visitors can start creating immediately with free daily Fast generations. No registration or credit card needed.
whyUs.reason2Desc: Choose Pro when your prompt needs more texture, control, and polish.
whyUs.reason3Desc: Our optimized generation pipeline delivers images in seconds with zero friction.

pricing.title: Start for free, scale as you grow

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Fast image generation includes a daily free allowance. Video creation uses credits and requires sign-in.
faq.q2: What is the difference between Fast and Pro mode?
faq.a2: Fast mode is free and optimized for speed. Pro mode uses high-precision models (12 credits) to deliver ultra-detailed, commercial-grade artwork.
faq.q3: What can I create with RenderPop?
faq.a3: Create images from a text prompt, or make a video from a prompt or a still image. Image-to-video creation follows the shape of your source image.
faq.q4: Do my unused monthly credits rollover?
faq.a4: Yes, active subscription credits roll over into your next period, up to 2x your monthly credit allowance.

footer.description: RenderPop turns prompts and still images into AI images and videos without model setup.
